name: Tanke Biosciences Corp
business: Tanke Biosciences is a leading animal nutrition and feed additive provider in China, producing 26 branded feed additives for livestock and farmed fish. Its products optimize growth and health, with organic trace mineral additives accounting for 86% of revenue.
sellsTo: Southeast Asia, Latin America, other developing countries

exposures.sentence: Our products optimize the growth and health of livestock such as pigs, poultry, and cattle, as well as farmed fish, and seek to capitalize on China’s growing demand for safe and reasonably priced food.
